Name: Clan Ghost Bear
Description: One of the clans that invaded the Inner Sphere in the 3050s.
ReputationStatements: Even Clans occasionally requires the services of mercenaries, Commander. We will look highly upon you, should you aid us.

MissionSuccessStatements: The Ghost Bears congratulate you on your successful mission, mercenary. We are pleased you've been able to assist us so thoroughly.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: It seems apparent that while you failed to achieve our goals, you engaged the enemy for as long as you were able. Better luck next time, Commander. May the Spirit of Kerensky be with you.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Your performance on that operation was positively abysmal. We roundly condemn your inadequacies.
